mapper.select: SELECT p.POST_ID AS postId, c.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, p.TITLE AS title, p.NICKNAME AS nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_SCRAP WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID) AS scrapCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID AND DELETED_YN = 'N') AS commentCount, p.VIEW_COUNT as viewCount, p.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCount FROM COMMUNITY_POST p JOIN COMMUNITY_CATEGORY c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.CATEGORY_ID WHERE p.USER_ID = #{userId} AND p.DELETED_YN = 'N' ORDER BY p.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT cm.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, cm.POST_ID AS postId, c.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, cm.NICKNAME AS nickname, cm.CONTENT AS content, p.TITLE AS postTitle, p.SCRAP_COUNT AS scrapCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID AND DELETED_YN = 'N') AS commentCount, cm.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, p.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCount FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT cm JOIN COMMUNITY_POST p ON cm.POST_ID = p.POST_ID JOIN COMMUNITY_CATEGORY c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.CATEGORY_ID WHERE cm.USER_ID = #{userId} AND cm.DELETED_YN = 'N' AND p.DELETED_YN = 'N' ORDER BY cm.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.POST_ID AS postId, c.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, p.CS_CATEGORY_ID AS csCategoryId, p.TITLE AS title, p.NICKNAME AS nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_SCRAP WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID) AS scrapCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID AND DELETED_YN = 'N') AS commentCount, p.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, p.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCount FROM COMMUNITY_POST p JOIN COMMUNITY_CATEGORY c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.CATEGORY_ID WHERE p.DELETED_YN = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM COMMUNITY_SCRAP cs WHERE cs.POST_ID = p.POST_ID AND cs.USER_ID = #{userId} ) ORDER BY p.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.POST_ID AS postId, c.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, p.TITLE AS title, p.NICKNAME AS nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_SCRAP WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID) AS scrapCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT WHERE POST_ID = p.POST_ID AND DELETED_YN = 'N') AS commentCount, p.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, p.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCount FROM COMMUNITY_POST p JOIN COMMUNITY_CATEGORY c ON p.CATEGORY_ID = c.CATEGORY_ID WHERE p.DELETED_YN = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM COMMUNITY_LIKE cl WHERE cl.POST_ID = p.POST_ID AND cl.USER_ID = #{userId} ) ORDER BY p.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
